---
title: "get_settled_events"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_settled_events()`

Get Settled Events

## Usage

```r
get_settled_events(
  series_ticker = NULL,
  limit = 100,
  max_pages = NULL,
  kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API",
  demo = FALSE
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `series_ticker` | Character. Filter by series ticker. |
| `limit` | Integer. Results per page (1-200). Defaults to 100. |
| `max_pages` | Integer. Maximum pages to fetch. NULL for all. |
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. Environment variable name for API key. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

A tibble with settled event information.

## Description

Retrieves settled events with optional filtering.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
# Get all settled events for a series
events <- get_settled_events(series_ticker = "KXHIGHNY")

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other history: 
`get_event_candlesticks()`,
`get_event_results()`,
`get_market_history()`,
`get_series_history()`,
`get_settled_markets()`,
`get_trade_history()`
